zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas De Staunton於1368年出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾史道頓時，他的父親Ralph De Staunton37歲，母親Constance Sutton31歲。他於1398年與Margaret Maperly在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾史道頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1446年5月9日在他的家鄉享年78歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾史道頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas De Staunton于1368年出生在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾史道頓时，他的父亲Ralph De Staunton37岁，母亲Constance Sutton31岁。他于1398年与Margaret Maperly在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾史道頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1446年5月9日在他的家乡享年78岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾廷加姆爾史道頓。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Staunton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Caitlin, Ciaran, Cormac.

English and Irish: variant of Stanton . This English name has been established (in this spelling) since medieval times in Ireland (Mayo, Connacht), where it has been Gaelicized as de Stonndún. Compare McEvilly .

variants.name: McEvilly
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac an Mhílidh ‘son of the knight’, from Gaelic míleadh ‘warrior, knight’. In County Mayo and County Cork, a family of English origin Gaelicized their name from Staunton to Mac an Mhílidh, apparently because of the latter's presumed similarity to the name of their ancestor, Milo de Stanton.

variants.name: Stanton
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places in England called Stanton or Staunton, especially Stanton in Staffordshire and Staunton in Worcestershire, all named with Old English stān ‘stone’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. Most of the placenames come from their situation on stony ground, but in the case of Stanton Harcourt in Oxfordshire and Stanton Drew in Avon the reference is to the proximity of prehistoric stone monuments. The name has also sometimes been chosen by Ashkenazic Jews as an Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish surnames. This surname has also long been established in Ireland (especially Mayo).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas De Staunton was born in 1368, in Staunton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Ralph De Staunton, was 37 and his mother, Constance Sutton, was 31. He married Margaret Maperly in 1398, in Staunton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 9 May 1446, in his hometown, at the age of 78, and was buried in Staunton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas De Staunton est né en 1368, à Staunton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ralph De Staunton, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Constance Sutton, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Maperly en 1398, à Staunton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 9 mai 1446, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 78 ans, et a été enterré à Staunton, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas De Staunton 1368 in Staunton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph De Staunton 37 und seine Mutter Constance Sutton 31. Er hat 1398 in Staunton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom Margaret Maperly geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 9. Mai 1446 im Alter von 78 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Staunton, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas De Staunton è nato il nel 1368 nel Staunton, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Ralph De Staunton, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Constance Sutton, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Maperly nel 1398, nel Staunton, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 9 maggio 1446, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 78 anni, e fu sepolto a Staunton, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas De Stauntonが1368年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアスタウントンで生まれた時，父Ralph De Stauntonは37歳，母Constance Suttonは31歳であった。1398年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアスタウントンでMargaret Maperlyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1446年5月9日に故郷で78歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアスタウントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas De Staunton(이)가 1368년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 스타운턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph De Staunton(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Constance Sutton(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1398년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 스타운턴에서 Margaret Maperly(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1446년 5월 9일 그의 고향에서 78세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 스타운턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas De Staunton nasceu em 1368, em Staunton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Ralph De Staunton, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Constance Sutton, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Maperly em 1398, em Staunton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 9 de maio de 1446, em sua cidade natal, com 78 anos, e foi sepultado em Staunton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas De Staunton родился в 1368 г. в местности стаунтон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Ralph De Staunton было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Constance Sutton, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Maperly в 1398 г. в местности стаунтон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 9 мая 1446 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 78 лет и был похоронен в местности стаунтон, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas De Staunton nació en 1368, en Staunton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Ralph De Staunton, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Constance Sutton, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Margaret Maperly en 1398, en Staunton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 9 de mayo de 1446, en su pueblo, a la edad de 78 años, y fue sepultado en Staunton, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
